notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateDrgDetails accepts compartment_id, defined_tags, display_name, and freeform_tags, while UpdateDrgDetails adds default_drg_route_tables as the only extra mutable surface; requested default route-table overrides therefore reconcile after create rather than inside CreateDrg.
Vendored SDK lifecycle success is AVAILABLE; the handwritten runtime requeues PROVISIONING, defensive literal UPDATING, TERMINATING, and TERMINATED states.

ListDrgsRequest only filters by compartmentId and returns Items []Drg. The handwritten runtime binds by exact compartment_id plus display_name within the requested compartment, rereads a single candidate through GetDrg, skips reuse when display_name is blank, and fails on duplicates instead of guessing.

Delete confirmation is absence-based rather than a DELETED SDK state, so observed TERMINATING and TERMINATED keep the finalizer in place until GetDrg returns not found. The create-fallback wrapper only recovers first-create post-read failures when status already carries the created DRG OCID plus a provisioning-like or AVAILABLE lifecycle.
